name: BISHENG
tagline: Open LLMOps platform for building enterprise AI applications
metaDescription: BISHENG is an open-source LLM devops platform for enterprises, offering visual workflows, RAG, agents, document parsing, and enterprise-grade security controls.
overview: BISHENG is an open-source LLM application devops platform focused on enterprise scenarios. It has been used by many industry-leading organizations and Fortune 500 companies to build and run AI applications in production.

The platform combines a visual workflow builder, RAG pipelines, agents, and high-precision document parsing in one place. It is named after Bi Sheng, the inventor of movable type printing, reflecting its goal of helping spread practical AI applications widely.
BISHENG ships as a self-hosted stack you run with Docker Compose, bundling third-party components like Elasticsearch, Milvus, and OnlyOffice so a full enterprise setup works out of the box.
features: Visual BISHENG Workflow that handles loops, parallelism, batch processing, and conditional logic by drawing them directly on a flowchart
Human-in-the-loop execution, letting users step in and give feedback during a running workflow, including multi-turn conversations
High-precision document parsing models for printed text, handwriting, rare characters, tables, layout analysis, and seals, deployable privately for free
Enterprise-grade controls including security review, RBAC, user group management, traffic control by group, and SSO/LDAP
Lingsight, a general-purpose agent built on the AGL (Agent Guidance Language) framework to embed domain expertise into AI behavior
Hundreds of components and thousands of parameters for complex tasks like document review, report generation, content review, and data analysis

gettingStarted.intro: BISHENG is self-hosted and runs with Docker Compose. Make sure you have CPU >= 4 virtual cores, RAM >= 16 GB, Docker 19.03.9+, and Docker Compose 1.25.1+ before you start. The recommended setup is 18 virtual cores and 48 GB RAM, since BISHENG also installs ES, Milvus, and OnlyOffice by default.

steps.heading: Download BISHENG
steps.body: Clone the repository and move into the docker installation directory.

steps.heading: Start the stack
steps.body: Bring up all services with Docker Compose.

steps.heading: Register the admin user
steps.body: Once startup finishes, open http://IP:3001 in your browser to reach the login page and register. By default, the first registered user becomes the system admin.

useCases: Building enterprise AI applications such as document review, fixed-layout report generation, and policy update comparison
Running RAG and knowledge mining over large document sets with high-precision parsing of tables, handwriting, and seals
Orchestrating multi-agent collaboration and customer service or support ticket assistance with human oversight
Standing up a governed, self-hosted LLMOps platform with RBAC, SSO/LDAP, and traffic controls for regulated organizations
